# pexip_infinity_mssip_proxy (Resource)

Manages an MSSIP proxy configuration with the Infinity service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_mssip_proxy" "example" {
  name    = "Corporate Skype for Business Proxy"
  address = "sfb-proxy.company.com"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The IP address or FQDN of the Skype for Business server to use for outbound MSSIP calls. Maximum length: 255 characters.
- `name` (String) The name used to refer to this Skype for Business server. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the Skype for Business server. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `port` (Number) The IP port of the Skype for Business server. Range: 1 to 65535. Default: 5061.
- `transport` (String) The IP transport used to connect to the Skype for Business server. Valid choices: tcp, tls.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the MS-SIP proxy.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the MSSIP proxy
